name: Overdrive V3 - WhatsApp Campaign Engine
description: Multi-WABA WhatsApp campaign dispatcher with weighted round-robin scoring.

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.description: Install devDependencies so the build (vite + esbuild) can run.

TTS_DISABLED.description: TTS microservice (Coqui XTTS v2 + PyTorch) does not fit in Heroku slug limit. Disable to avoid runtime errors.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (Heroku Postgres or external).

META_APP_SECRET.description: Meta App Secret (Facebook for Developers > App > Settings > Basic).

WEBHOOK_VERIFY_TOKEN.description: Verify token used by Meta to confirm webhook ownership (any string).

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Admin password seeded on boot (will overwrite on every deploy).
